nodes.name: Chestnut-shouldered goshawk
nodes.summary: Chestnut-shouldered goshawk（Erythrotriorchis buergersi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Chestnut-shouldered goshawk。

nodes.name: Chestnut-shouldered goshawk
nodes.summary: The chestnut-shouldered goshawk (Erythrotriorchis buergersi) is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae. It is found in New Guinea. It has a length of 43 to 53 cm and a wingspan of 85 to 109 cm. References

nodes.name: Erythrotriorchis
nodes.summary: Erythrotriorchis（Erythrotriorchis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Red goshawk、Chestnut-shouldered goshawk。
